'''Security collars''' were a type of [[Shock collar/Legends|slaving collar]] that was manufactured by the [[Thalassian slavers/Legends|Thalassian Slavers]]. 

==Description==
The security collar consisted of an adjustable<ref name="EGWT" /> [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] neck restraint connected to a heavy chain. The brace was secured by a [[Magnolock/Legends|magnolock]],<ref name="AE" /> and incorporated [[shock panel]]s into the interior of the ring.<ref name="EGWT" /> The collars were designed to be escape-proof and resistant to tampering; attempting to remove them without inputting the proper [[circuit key]] triggered the shock panels to deliver a painful neural shock that were potentially lethal. Some variants of the collar had biometric or voice-activated [[Lock/Legends|locks]].<ref name="LNH">''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]''</ref> They could be attached to other collars or a pair of [[Stuncuffs/Legends|stun cuffs]].<ref name="AE" />

==History==
[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] used these kinds of collars to restrain his [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] dancers and keep them within easy reach. [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] was forced to wear one of these collars during the time that she was captured by Jabba during her part in the [[Rescue of Han Solo/Legends|mission]] to rescue [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="EGWT" />
